name: wireframes-toolkit
description: Create and audit universal black-and-white Figma wireframes with Auto Layout and structured UX flows.

interface.longDescription: Build and audit editable monochrome product wireframes with Auto Layout, reusable components, realistic states, responsive behavior, and visual QA. A bundled setup skill safely installs optional UX research, design-system, and critique companions.
defaultPrompt: Turn this product brief into a complete Figma wireframe flow.
Audit these Figma wireframes for UX and Auto Layout issues.
Extend this wireframe flow with missing states and edge cases.
